subcodes.first_line: O thou who art consumed by the fire of separation! I have perused thy missive, which spoke of thy love for the Beloved of all horizons and thy steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من احترق من نار الفراق قد تلوت الورقه الناطقه بمحبه محبوب الافاق و ثبوتک
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
